abilities.name: sand-spit
abilities.shortEffect: Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.
abilities.effect: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it's hit by an attack.

abilities.name: shed-skin
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.
abilities.effect: After each turn, this Pokémon has a 33% of being cured of any major status ailment.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon may cure its own status conditions by shedding its skin.

abilities.name: sand-veil
abilities.shortEffect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.
abilities.effect: During a sandstorm, this Pokémon has 1.25× its evasion, and it does not take sandstorm damage regardless of type. The evasion bonus does not count as a stat modifier. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved in a sandstorm.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness in a sandstorm.
